expectations.text: The output is valid prd.json with at least 5 user stories.
expectations.evidence:
{
  "project": "Task Statuses",
  "branchName": "task-statuses",
  "description": "Add task status tracking and filtering.",
  "userStories": [
    {
      "id": "US-001",
      "title": "Add task status schema default",
      "description": "As a product team, I want tasks to store a status value so that task progress persists reliably.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Add a `status` column or field to tasks with allowed values `pending`, `in_progress`, and `done`",
        "Existing tasks default to `pending` after migration or backfill",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "db/migrations/add-task-status.sql",
        "src/db/schema/tasks.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 1,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-002",
      "title": "Expose task status in shared models",
      "description": "As a developer, I want shared task types to include status so that backend and UI code use one contract.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Shared task model or DTO includes the status field and enum values",
        "Task list data returned to the UI includes status for each task",
        "Typecheck passes"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/models/task.ts",
        "src/types/task.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 2,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-003",
      "title": "Add backend task status update action",
      "description": "As a user, I want task status changes to save immediately so that the task list reflects current progress.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Provide a server action, endpoint, or service that updates a task status to pending, in_progress, or done",
        "Reject invalid status values before persistence",
        "Updated task status is returned or revalidated for the task list",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/tasks/updateTaskStatus.ts",
        "src/server/routes/tasks.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 3,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-004",
      "title": "Add backend task list status filter",
      "description": "As a user, I want the task list query to filter by status so that I can focus on a subset of work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list data source accepts an optional status filter",
        "Filtering returns only tasks matching the selected status",
        "The default task list still returns all tasks when no filter is selected",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Tests pass"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/server/tasks/listTasks.ts",
        "src/server/routes/tasks.ts"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 4,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-005",
      "title": "Show task status badge on cards",
      "description": "As a user, I want each task card to show its current status so that I can scan progress quickly.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task cards display a visible badge for pending, in progress, or done",
        "Badge text matches the task status returned by the data model",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskCard.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 5,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-006",
      "title": "Add task list status control",
      "description": "As a user, I want to change task status from the task list so that I do not have to open a separate detail view.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Each task row or card exposes a status control with pending, in progress, and done options",
        "Changing the control invokes the backend status update and refreshes the visible task state",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskRow.tsx",
        "src/components/tasks/TaskCard.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 6,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    },
    {
      "id": "US-007",
      "title": "Add task list status filter UI",
      "description": "As a user, I want a task list filter for status so that I can quickly view pending, active, or completed work.",
      "acceptanceCriteria": [
        "Task list includes filter options for All, Pending, In Progress, and Done",
        "Changing the filter reloads or refines the list using the backend status filter",
        "Typecheck passes",
        "Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill"
      ],
      "filesLikelyTouched": [
        "src/components/tasks/TaskListFilters.tsx",
        "src/pages/tasks/index.tsx"
      ],
      "designGuidance": [],
      "priority": 7,
      "passes": false,
      "notes": ""
    }
  ]
}

expectations.text: The stories separately cover schema, backend status updates, badge display, status controls, and filtering.
